message:
fix: flaky test and code quality cleanup

- Fix test_daemon_pid_when_not_running: use custom config with both
  socket_path and pid_path to avoid reading from real daemon's PID file
- Fix clippy warning: use inlined format args in print_data()
- Apply rustfmt to hybrid.rs

Closes bd-1ryf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
